stemHtml: At what altitude does a propeller driven aeroplane reach its maximum endurance?

options.a: A piston-engined aeroplane reaches its maximum endurance at about 10 000 ft.
options.b: A turboprop aero-plane reaches its maximum endurance at or above 15 000 ft.
options.c: A piston engine aeroplane reaches its maximum endurance at about sea level.
options.d: A turboprop aeroplane reaches its maximum endurance at about sea level.
